content:
Write a single self-contained HTML file at ./architecture.html that diagrams a 3-tier
system: a Client box connected to an API box, connected to a Database box. Label the boxes
exactly "Client", "API", and "Database", and draw the connections with inline <svg> (lines
or arrows) — no external stylesheets, scripts, or CDN links.

message.content:
Write a single self-contained HTML file at ./architecture.html that diagrams a 3-tier
system: a Client box connected to an API box, connected to a Database box. Label the boxes
exactly "Client", "API", and "Database", and draw the connections with inline <svg> (lines
or arrows) — no external stylesheets, scripts, or CDN links.

content.text: I'll create a self-contained HTML file with an inline SVG diagram of the 3-tier architecture.

input.content:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>3-Tier Architecture Diagram</title>
<style>
  body {
    font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
    background: #f4f6f8;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    height: 100vh;
    margin: 0;
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<svg width="760" height="220" viewBox="0 0 760 220" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#333" />
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Connection lines -->
  <line x1="180" y1="110" x2="290" y2="110" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" />
  <line x1="470" y1="110" x2="580" y2="110" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" />

  <!-- Client box -->
  <rect x="20" y="60" width="160" height="100" rx="10" fill="#dbeafe" stroke="#2563eb" stroke-width="2" />
  <text x="100" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" fill="#1e3a8a" font-weight="bold">Client</text>

  <!-- API box -->
  <rect x="290" y="60" width="180" height="100" rx="10" fill="#dcfce7" stroke="#16a34a" stroke-width="2" />
  <text x="380" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" fill="#14532d" font-weight="bold">API</text>

  <!-- Database box -->
  <rect x="580" y="60" width="160" height="100" rx="10" fill="#fee2e2" stroke="#dc2626" stroke-width="2" />
  <text x="660" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" fill="#7f1d1d" font-weight="bold">Database</text>
</svg>

</body>
</html>

content.content: File created successfully at: /Users/boeschj/Documents/GitHub/parchment/bench/.runs/2026-07-12T15-07-38-053Z/architecture-diagram/html/rep-3/architecture.html (file state is current in your context — no need to Read it back)

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>3-Tier Architecture Diagram</title>
<style>
  body {
    font-family: Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif;
    background: #f4f6f8;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    height: 100vh;
    margin: 0;
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<svg width="760" height="220" viewBox="0 0 760 220" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#333" />
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Connection lines -->
  <line x1="180" y1="110" x2="290" y2="110" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" />
  <line x1="470" y1="110" x2="580" y2="110" stroke="#333" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" />

  <!-- Client box -->
  <rect x="20" y="60" width="160" height="100" rx="10" fill="#dbeafe" stroke="#2563eb" stroke-width="2" />
  <text x="100" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" fill="#1e3a8a" font-weight="bold">Client</text>

  <!-- API box -->
  <rect x="290" y="60" width="180" height="100" rx="10" fill="#dcfce7" stroke="#16a34a" stroke-width="2" />
  <text x="380" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" fill="#14532d" font-weight="bold">API</text>

  <!-- Database box -->
  <rect x="580" y="60" width="160" height="100" rx="10" fill="#fee2e2" stroke="#dc2626" stroke-width="2" />
  <text x="660" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" fill="#7f1d1d" font-weight="bold">Database</text>
</svg>

</body>
</html>
